visual_description: Two men stand facing each other in an indoor hallway; one wears a pink plaid shirt with his back partially to the camera, while the other, in a blue plaid shirt, faces him with arms crossed. The man in blue appears to be speaking, his gaze directed at the other man, who turns slightly toward him. Behind them, a wooden door with the number “232” and a framed picture on the wall are visible.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and loudness, speaking at a moderate pace with a neutral tone.
